name: BN Wolf Lines Co
districts_or_customers: Local Antioch/Lake County, IL area; categorized as Transportation for the Disabled
recent_news: No M&A or material news found. Active small operator listed in Antioch, IL.
fit_notes: Very small (~12 employees, ~$1M rev) Lake County IL paratransit/disabled-transport operator. No clear school bus contract footprint surfaced; likely too small and not core school-bus to be a Summit tuck-in unless adjacency play. Low priority.

name: Medivac Wheel Chair Vans
districts_or_customers: Shelby County, IA and surrounding western Iowa; emergency rescue and medical transport, not school districts
recent_news: No M&A activity surfaced. Continues as local ambulance/rescue service since 1979.
fit_notes: NOT a school-bus operator. This is an ambulance/EMS provider (Medivac Ambulance Corp) with some wheelchair-van capability. Out of scope for Summit's K-12 student-transportation tuck-in thesis.

name: ACC Midwest Transportation
principals: Eric O. Labraaten (CEO/Owner); operates alongside Labraaten Bus Company under common management
districts_or_customers: Serves 16 Midwest MN counties (Aitkin, Carver, Cass, Crow Wing, Morrison, Todd, Wright, McLeod, Meeker, Kandiyohi, Renville, Sibley, Yellow Medicine, Lyon, Lincoln, Redwood); Labraaten Bus Co. serves charter and public schools within ~30 miles of Hutchinson and Buffalo, MN
recent_news: No M&A activity found. Independent family operator since 2012.
fit_notes: Independent family-owned MN operator combining special-needs/NEMT (ACC Midwest) with school bus (Labraaten Bus Co.). Small but real school-transport adjacency in Summit state (MN). Worth a low-cost outreach for tuck-in/SPED route consolidation; ask whether owners want to monetize the school bus arm separately.

name: Rochdale Taxi Cabs
districts_or_customers: San Juan, PR tourists and residents; Puerto Rico Tourism Company-certified; no school district customers identified
recent_news: No M&A activity found. Long-running San Juan taxi cooperative (since 1947/1955 depending on source).
fit_notes: NOT a school-bus/student-transportation operator. This is a San Juan taxi cooperative serving tourists and medical appointments. Out of scope for Summit; also outside Summit's footprint (PR).

name: North Reading Transportation
districts_or_customers: 70+ communities/school districts across eastern Massachusetts, central Massachusetts, and southern New Hampshire; affiliated Trombly Motor Coach, SP&R, and Coppola also rolled in
recent_news: Acquired by Beacon Mobility in 2021, becoming a flagship MA platform within Beacon's 25-state footprint. Beacon is backed by Audax Private Equity.
fit_notes: NOT an independent tuck-in target. NRT was acquired by Beacon Mobility (Audax-backed) in 2021 and is now a competitor platform to Summit. Track for competitive intel, not for acquisition.
